title: bicornella glandulosa
intro: Bicornella glandulosa, also known as the "two-horned glandular plant", is a tropical plant species native to the Pacific region, characterized by its unique two-horned appearance and glandular leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Bicornella glandulosa has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and also used in traditional remedies such as infusions and poultices.
